description: Retrieve and synthesize knowledge from the user's own notes, topic pages, and context-memory facts in response to 'what do you know about X', 'tell me about Y', 'what about Z', 'any info on W' phrasings. Pre-LLM retrieval pulls the top semantically-similar chunks from the on-device vector index; the prompt cites the source ('from your notes', 'you mentioned in topic Y') and never fabricates content not present in the retrieved chunks.
triggerPhrases: what can you tell me about
